## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena.im to discuss SEO progress, website traffic, and conversion strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Organic search traffic is growing, but overall monthly active users (MAU) are declining](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Need to focus on conversion rate optimization (CRO) to capitalize on increased traffic](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Team will add Google Analytics data to reports for more comprehensive insights](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Strategic decisions needed on SEO efforts based on traffic vs conversion performance](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Clicks and impressions increased by \~6,000 over the last week](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Cumulative growth trend continues, with slight slowdown in impression growth](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Team switching focus from stacked metrics to weekly growth for clearer insights](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### Website Traffic Analysis

  - [October tracking to be best month of the year with \~3,800 organic clicks](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [MAU reached 48,000 in October, down from 81,000 in September and 117,000 in August](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Concern raised about high traffic (173,000 visitors) not translating to increased sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)

### Conversion Rate Optimization

  - [Implementing exit pop-ups and planning to add e-book offers within articles](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Need to focus on improving CTAs and overall conversion strategy](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Team to brainstorm and present CRO ideas for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Over 30 quality topics in the pipeline for future content](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Added metadata optimization for high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)
  - [New performance report includes best ranking keywords for published articles](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1997.0)

### Lead Generation

  - [Renewed focus on creating e-books related to popular articles](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [Plan to use keyword data to inform new lead magnet creation](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
  - [Recent lead generation efforts resulted in interest from two agencies and a publisher](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andre to get access to Google Analytics and add MAU data to reports](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Team to prepare CRO ideas and strategies for next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)
  - [Discuss strategic direction for SEO efforts based on traffic vs conversion performance](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [Continue metadata optimization for high-impression articles](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)
  - [Develop more e-books and lead magnets based on popular content and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
  - [Update author names on articles to real team members for improved E-A-T signals](https://fathom.video/share/gcdCcvXt3FNy1ZUQM6Z7E6xUNgHnNPWx?tab=summary&timestamp=2122.0)
